overlay_pattern.summary: This creator uses media overlays primarily in the form of picture-in-picture videos and images, strategically placed to enhance visual engagement during key narrative moments. Most overlays are animated and often positioned centrally or towards the right side of the frame, aligning with important dialogue to emphasize the content being discussed.

entries.script_context: During key points in the script, particularly at the hook and in the middle segment.
In the middle of the narrative, relating directly to the content being discussed.
In the middle of the narrative, connected to user funding.
